tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO github_issues (state, title, repository) SELECT 'open', 'Verify: ' || title, 'acme/web' FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'merged' AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL;","params":[]}
